speaker: Seeker

text: Theek, teen chhote options: 1) subah khet jaane se pehle 3 minute kandha-gardan ko dheere ghumaao, 2) jakdan aaye toh 10 gehri saans leke haath se seena halka dabao, 3) raat ko sone se pehle ek line likho - aaj dard kab badha aur kab halka hua.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh saans wala kar sakta hoon. Khet mein beech beech mein 2 minute mil jaate hain.

speaker: Supporter

text: Pehle jab jakdan aaye tab kaam 1 minute rokna. Phir ek haath seena par rakhke naak se 4 count saans andar, muh se 6 count bahar, aise 10 round. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker

strategy_intent: Health distress ko rural-financial pressure se normalize karna aur worth separate karna.

text: Par gaon mein log hansenge, yahi darr hai. Isliye chup rehna hi safe lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Teen chhote options lo: 1) kaam se pehle 2 minute pair aur kandhe dheere stretch, 2) gale mein atkaav aaye toh 10 slow breaths, 3) raat ko ek line note karo saans kab bhaari hui.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter

text: Pehle jab saans bhaari lage tab kaam 1 minute rokna. Phir naak se 4 count saans andar, muh se 6 count bahar, total 10 round. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
